steps.prompt: Feelings have names — and now we're going to write them! Find sad and trace it!
steps.feedback: Sad. Three letters. Everyone feels sad sometimes.
Shy! Just three letters — a quiet little word.
Smile! Five letters and a happy feeling.
Angry. Five letters for a big feeling. Last one — find worried!
Worried! Seven letters — your biggest word today. You wrote them all!
